Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Checklist Completed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Checklist Completed to occur after SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days, defined as the duration between its occurrence and the subsequent SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed when the latter precedes checklist completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants where export occurs after the due notice
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Cycle time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days, measured as the interval between its timestamp and the next distinct activity in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the end of the case

Name: Average time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in complex variants involving multiple reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers) in cases that proceed beyond initial screening
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total waiting time to SW-Checklist Completed after SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days, excluding system processing delays
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, or SW-EIC Major Revision) in completed review trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the next checklist-related escalation (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion now due) when such escalation occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion now due'
